Speaker 1: You guys hear a ringing?
Speaker 2: What the hell is this?
Speaker 1: Hey! Handcuffs! And fur line, nice! I didn't know you guys had it in ya!
Speaker 3: Chandler, you don't have a sister so you can't understand how much this bums me out.
Speaker 2: I didn't know Monica had these!
Speaker 1: Mhm, maybe she used them with another boyfriend. Maybe Richard!
Speaker 2: Why would she use them with Richard and not me? I can be kinky! I once did a naked dance for her... with scarves!
Speaker 3: Bumming hard, guys, bumming hard.
